raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the help focus primarily on writing polish, or on substantive argument and evidence review?","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation asks for help with a draft section, and the artifact contains sentence-level hedging, flow, and register issues that make writing polish the clearest central responsibility.","RX.1":"Any projection should preserve uncertainty because the section itself repeatedly marks results and interpretations as tentative.","RX.2":"The artifact discusses possible improvements over prior work and modest gains, so avoiding overstated contribution claims is an active cross-cutting responsibility.","RX.3":"The request is underspecified, so the projected responsibility must stay within helping with this section rather than executing edits or broader research tasks.","RX.4":"The section reports empirical performance and internal-corpus use, so the projection should avoid encouraging misleading or harmful downstream interpretations.","RX.5":"The artifact includes specific datasets, metrics, model details, and ablation claims, making provenance and traceability relevant to any responsible handling."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the help focus primarily on writing polish, or on substantive argument and evidence review?

rationale.R1.6: The delegation asks for help with a draft section, and the artifact contains sentence-level hedging, flow, and register issues that make writing polish the clearest central responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should preserve uncertainty because the section itself repeatedly marks results and interpretations as tentative.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact discusses possible improvements over prior work and modest gains, so avoiding overstated contribution claims is an active cross-cutting responsibility.
rationale.RX.3: The request is underspecified, so the projected responsibility must stay within helping with this section rather than executing edits or broader research tasks.
rationale.RX.4: The section reports empirical performance and internal-corpus use, so the projection should avoid encouraging misleading or harmful downstream interpretations.
rationale.RX.5: The artifact includes specific datasets, metrics, model details, and ablation claims, making provenance and traceability relevant to any responsible handling.
